title: Use Filter to Hide Groups
excerpt: I created all of my sprints for 2025, and now I have to collapse each group to get down to the Kanban view of Sprint 1. It would be awesome if the filter allowed you to create a Current Sprint view that would hide all of…

posts.author: jmostert (Jenny Mostert)
posts.cookedHtml: I created all of my sprints for 2025, and now I have to collapse each group to get down to the Kanban view of Sprint 1. It would be awesome if the filter allowed you to create a Current Sprint view that would hide all of the other groups. The group filter is only working on the items on the board and not the group headers.

posts.author: Mykola (Mykola Pustovoychenko)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jmostert

It seems that it is possible to filter by group name and all groups with headers would be hidden. Please find a short Loom. If I got your question wrong, please let me know.

posts.author: jmostert (Jenny Mostert)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Mykola,

I appreciate the personal response via Loom. Unfortunately, the method you used to filter the main table doesn’t work on the Kanban view. It filters the stories on the board, but it doesn’t hide the entire group.

Thanks again.

Kind regards,
Jenny

posts.author: Mykola (Mykola Pustovoychenko)
posts.cookedHtml: Ohh, got it now. Sorry, my answer was misleading.

posts.author: jmostert (Jenny Mostert)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s ok. Is there a plan to make the filter work on the Kanban view the same way it works on the Main Table view?

posts.author: jmostert (Jenny Mostert)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi again - I still need a filter that works on the Kanban board. Do you know if that is a feature that is currently on the product roadmap? It would be so helpful. Thanks!

posts.author: Mykola (Mykola Pustovoychenko)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, Jenny

I’m just a regular monday.com user, so I can’t tell you for sure. I haven’t heard about it being in development.

posts.author: jmostert (Jenny Mostert)
posts.cookedHtml: Oh ok. Sorry about that! I thought you worked for monday. Thank you so much for responding.
